## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No hardcoded brand colours in component JSX (use Tailwind tokens or `brand.ts`)
- [ ] UK English used in all user-facing text
- [ ] If pricing data changed — link to source: <!-- URL -->
- [ ] If new calculation logic — unit tests added
